creator: kiel@physics.utexas.edu
text:
motherboard: Amptron PM8500
processor: Pentium MMX 166MHz
RAM: 64 MB
SCSI card: AHA 2940UW, bios 1.32
hard disk: IBM DCAS 34330
video: S3
when booting the installation diskette the following messages show up:
ahc0 <Adaptec 2940 Ultra SCSI host adapter rev 1 in a irq 11 on pci:3:0
ahc: aic 7880 Wide Channel. SCSI Id=7, 16SCBs
ahc0 waiting for scsi devices to settle
.............. long wait, nothing happens ...........
ahc:0 board not responding
.............  compter hangs up  ...............

The computer funcions properly with DOS or OS/2 (both can be installed 
and boot)
